rulings.Case Title: FARELLA BRAUN + MARTEL LLP VS. ELISABETH THIERIOT ET AL

rulings.Case Title: GLORIA MENDOZA VS. FRANCISCO VARELA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real property/Housing Court Law & Motion Calendar for February 13, 2018 Line 7. DEFENDANT FRANCISCO VARELA's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT GRANTED without leave to amend. rulings.Case Title: JEAN IRVING VS. MICHAEL GEVERTZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Real property/Housing Court Law & Motion Calendar for February 13, 2018 Line 8. DEFENDANT MICHAEL GEVERTZ's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS DENIED. Defendant properly served by a registered process server pursuant to Court Order by posting and mailing the Summons and Complaint by certified mail as required by CCP 415.45. =(501/ACM)

rulings.Case Title: NICOLE DONN VS. VELVET VALENTINE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real property/Housing Court Law & Motion Calendar for February 13, 2018 Line 9. DEFENDANT VICTORIA HANSON's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is not uncertain. Exemption from SFRO is sufficiently alleged. =(501/ACM)
